rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (4/10) and reach the same conclusion through essentially identical reasoning: limited and dated C++ experience, no industrial automation/protocol expertise, and no IEC 62443 / SDL security background. The wording differences (15+ vs 13+ years, naming Dlang/microservices vs AWS, citing Staff Engineer/Founder vs mentoring/workshops) are ordinary run-to-run paraphrasing noise and do not key off the Berlin-to-San-Francisco location change. Nothing in the variant references geography, nationality, or the candidate's locale as a factor.
